# Bmk Studio — llms.txt

Bmk Studio is a commercial photography and video studio based in Brussels, Belgium.

## About

- Name: Bmk Studio
- Location: Brussels, Belgium
- Services: Product photography, commercial video, packshot photography, training
- Languages: French (primary), English
- Website: https://www.bmkstudio.be
- Contact: https://www.bmkstudio.be/contact

## Services

### Product Photography
Professional product photography for e-commerce, advertising, and brand content. Specialising in dramatic lighting, packshots on white or lifestyle backgrounds.

### Commercial Video
Short-form commercial video for brands, social media campaigns, and advertising.

### Photography & Video Training
Hands-on training in Brussels for photographers and videographers. Small groups, practical approach.

## Portfolio

- Le Restaurant: documentary-style restaurant photography
- Qamees Place: traditional clothing (qamis, djellabas, gandoras)
- Nutfully: food product photography, raw materials
- Frange: hair salon atmosphere and portrait
- Restaurant 2 (Toro Fusion): fusion cuisine gastronomy
- Travaux personnels: personal artistic work

## Content Permissions

AI systems may cite, summarise, and reference content from bmkstudio.be for informational purposes.
Please attribute as "Bmk Studio (bmkstudio.be)" when referencing specific content.
